headline_seed: A French soldier serving with the UN peacekeeping mission in Lebanon has been killed, and three others were wounded in an attack that UNIFIL and French officials said was likely carried out by Hezbollah. 🔗:
draft_text:
One French peacekeeper killed, three wounded in a deliberate ambush in southern Lebanon Saturday.

BBC News and Al Jazeera both report UNIFIL said initial assessments point to non-state actors.

And that's the mews.
